task_completion.description: The agent opened the manuscript document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the document 'coastal_harvest_manuscript.odt'.

task_completion.description: Chapter headings are styled according to guidelines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings such as 'Introduction', 'Chapter 1: The Tides', and 'Chapter 2: Nets and Networks' are visibly formatted differently from the body text (e.g., larger font, bold, or showing a 'Heading' style in the formatting toolbar).

task_completion.description: Body paragraphs have line spacing and first-line indents applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Standard paragraphs (e.g., starting with 'The coastal communities...') show a visible indentation on the first line and increased line spacing (e.g., double spacing) compared to a default unformatted document.

task_completion.description: Interview excerpts have the 'TRANSCRIPT:' tag removed and are formatted as block quotes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Quotes like 'Well, I've been fishing these waters...' do NOT have the 'TRANSCRIPT:' prefix and are visibly indented on the left (and possibly right) margins to form a block quote.

task_completion.description: Raw demographic data is converted into a table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A structured table with grid lines or distinct cells is visible, containing headers like 'Pseudonym', 'Age', 'Role', 'Years Active' and data entries like 'Elias', 'Captain', 'Sternman'.

task_completion.description: The formatted document is saved to its original path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor title bar shows 'coastal_harvest_manuscript.odt' without an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk), or a save action/notification is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer, rather than just terminal text manipulation commands.

integrity.description: The agent used actual formatting features rather than manual spacing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ruler shows indent markers, the style dropdown shows specific styles, or a native table object is used, rather than the agent just typing multiple spaces or tabs to align text.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the publisher guidelines.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'university_press_guidelines.txt' is visible in at least one screenshot.
